title: parosela eriophylla
intro: Parosela eriophylla, also known as Parosela or False Buttonbush, is a shrub native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Parosela eriophylla include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, and it has also been used to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Parosela eriophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
